fix: resolve CI scaffolding binary path for release builds (#9)

* fix: resolve CI scaffolding test binary path for release builds

The scaffolding BDD tests hardcoded `target/debug/lithair` but CI builds
with `--release` or `--profile ci`, producing the binary in
`target/release/`. Now tries release first, then falls back to debug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Address review feedback: the workspace defines a `ci` profile,
so check target/release and target/ci before falling back to debug.

commit.message:
feat: add ducklake_fdw for read-only access to DuckLake tables (#59)

## Summary

Add `ducklake_fdw`, a read-only Foreign Data Wrapper for DuckLake
tables. Supports both PostgreSQL-backed metadata catalogs and frozen
HTTP-hosted `.ducklake` snapshots.

Queries route through DuckDB via pg_duckdb's external-table-check hook,
preserving vectorized execution. Column definitions are auto-inferred at
`CREATE FOREIGN TABLE` time.

## Test plan

- All 19 regression tests pass (including `fdw` and `frozen_fdw`)
- All 2 isolation tests pass
- CI across PG 14-18

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: pg_ducklake
repository.description: Native lakehouse experience in Postgres powered by DuckDB & Ducklake

commit.message:
feat(chat): Add market signals context to ARIA system prompt

ARIA conversations now include recent market intelligence from the
market_signals table. Signals are fetched in parallel with other context,
keyword-matched when the user message references a specific signal, and
injected into both v1 and v2 system prompt builders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(patients): add patient registration, listing, detail, and editing (#2)

Implement the foundational patient management feature:
- Drizzle schema for patients table (scoped by psychologist_id)
- Shared types (Patient, CreatePatientInput, UpdatePatientInput, PaginatedResult)
- Shared validation functions for create and update operations
- Repository layer with CRUD operations (create, list, get, update)
- Server actions for form submissions with validation
- UI pages: paginated list, create form, detail view, edit form
- Reusable components: PatientForm, PatientList, Pagination
- Placeholder auth module for psychologist scoping
- 14 Vitest tests covering all validation logic

fix(seo-links): surface actual error messages + try Puppeteer for all fetch failures

- Use SvelteKit error() instead of throw new Error() in extractSeoLinkData
  so error messages survive RPC serialization (was always showing "Extragere eșuată")
- Fix UI catch block to read HttpError body.message
- Try Puppeteer fallback for ANY fetch failure, not just 403/503
- Add server-side logging for fetch failures

Replace SYS prompt with ScriptIQ master prompt v3

- Full rewrite: Hidden Internal Engine (6-step silent pre-writing
  process: Property DNA extraction, Narrative Spine selection, 6-hook
  generation + scoring, Callback planning, Retention Curve mapping,
  Do Not Invent guard)
- Stronger no-hallucination rules: never invent HOA, distances, school
  names, year built, sqft, or landmarks not in input
- Feature stacking clarified: one idea per line (feature OR meaning OR
  payoff, not all three crammed together)
- 10-point final self-check (up from 7)
- Trust moment now explicitly required in body
- Narrative spines: 8 arc types to choose from
- Kept JSON output format for app compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ci: add fuzz tests and ClusterFuzzLite CI workflows (#31)

* ci: add fuzz tests and ClusterFuzzLite CI workflows

Add native Go fuzz targets for config parsing (YAML, TOML, validation)
and hook logic (template expansion, event parsing, config building).
Set up ClusterFuzzLite infrastructure with PR and batch fuzzing workflows
to improve OpenSSF Scorecard fuzzing score.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: add go-118-fuzz-build dependency for ClusterFuzzLite

The compile_native_go_fuzzer tool in ClusterFuzzLite rewrites fuzz
targets to import github.com/AdamKorcz/go-118-fuzz-build/testing.
Add a blank import in a test file to keep the dependency in go.mod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: filter false-positive base64 matches and cap at 10 attachments

The regex was matching short base64-like strings from tool results,
producing 20-50 fake "images". Now requires minimum 1000 chars of
base64 data, deduplicates by prefix, and caps at Discord's 10-file
limit.

commit.message:
Increase translation loop threshold based on book size

Big books need more Lambda job cycles to fully translate (~200-400
pages per cycle). Was fixed at 3 retries, now min(6, pages/200).
Prevents premature needs_attention flagging for large books.

commit.message:
Replace & with 'and' in OG tags and page titles

Prevents & being encoded as & in meta content attributes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Buffer audio generation ahead of playback to eliminate gaps between sentences

Piper generates audio one sentence at a time on CPU, causing noticeable
pauses between sentences. This adds a producer-consumer queue so the next
sentence is generated in the background while the current one is playing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(argocd): add AppProject boundaries for cluster/user isolation

Create `cluster` and `user` AppProjects to isolate platform
infrastructure from user workloads. Each project restricts
which namespaces and source paths its Applications can use.

- 30 cluster apps → project: cluster (18 allowed namespaces)
- 22 user apps → project: user (apps, garage, woodpecker)
- argocd app stays on project: default (creates the AppProjects)
- apps-root + bootstrap-root stay on project: default

commit.message:
feat: Edge-triggered alerting, GitHub issues for all incidents, auto-close on resolution

- Switch from level-triggered to edge-triggered detection using knownDownEndpoints
  state to prevent re-investigating endpoints that are already known-down
- Move GitHub issue creation from remediation.ts (bad_deploy only) to the
  orchestration layer in status-agent.ts so ALL incident types get tracked
- Add closeIssue() to github-api.ts and auto-close issues with resolution
  details when incidents resolve
- Add recovery event type and dashboard rendering for endpoint recovery
- Increase health check interval from 30s to 60s
- Add github_issue_number column to incidents table

feat(bulk-gen): add size filtering and image matching to test gallery

Add --size and --all-sizes flags to create_test_gallery command for
testing specific aspect ratios. Refactor into modular methods for
single-size, per-size, and mixed-job creation.

Key changes:
- Add SIZE_TO_IMAGES mapping so sample images match the job's
  configured size, not the per-prompt config's size
- Add VALID_SIZES constant with input validation
- Fix GeneratedImage status from 'pending' to 'queued' to match
  model STATUS_CHOICES
- --size: create one job with a specific aspect ratio
- --all-sizes: create one job per aspect ratio (4 jobs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#583 Fix CRM SSE: no emitir session-expired en error de conexion

EventSource no expone HTTP status codes, asi que no podemos
distinguir un 401 (sesion expirada) de un 404 (endpoint no
desplegado) u otro error de red. Esto causaba logout inmediato
al seleccionar tenant dakeva porque /api/admin/events/stream
retornaba 404 y el hook asumia sesion expirada.

Solo el apiClient (fetch) puede detectar 401 reales.

commit.message:
feat: add memory safety, performance optimizations, flux1-schnell engine

- Add preflight VRAM + RAM check before engine load (InsufficientResourcesError)
- Add torch.compile, VAE tiling/slicing, TF32 matmul, inference_mode
- Add --no-compile flag to generate and batch commands
- Add flux1-schnell engine (fp8 quantized, Apache 2.0, 4-step)
- Template method in ImageEngine: consolidate generate(), _finalize_load()
- Cap GPU memory at 85% (set_per_process_memory_fraction)
- Engine caching in batch mode (one model load per engine)
- Batch cleanup runs once after all images, not per-image
- Skip preflight when engine already loaded
- Remove unused tomllib import from markdown.py
